cn.description:
Photo Eraser易于删除图像中不需要的对象如删除水印，日期戳，额外的文字，建筑等等并保持原有的重要视觉效果不发生改变。

您只需以红色去标记不需要的区域，Photo Eraser会在一分钟内美化你的照片。

产品特点：
- 删除不需要的对象。
- 从照片中删除人。
- 删除文字，签名等。
- 让肌肤瑕疵消失。
- 完全非技术性的软件，非常易用。


反馈：
任何建议将不胜感激，技术支持邮件：market@effectmatrix.com

cn.releaseNotes:
Swipe screen to change focal lengths. 
Double tap the screen for Full Screen mode.
The same, but better.

Smoother gallery browsing  
- Images now load more quickly as you scroll, so you can move through large collections without waiting  
- Thumbnails are sharper and more consistent, making it easier to spot the images you need at a glance  
- Improved layout and spacing help you scan rows of images without losing your place  

Stronger sync with Artemis Studio for Desktop  
- Changes you make on desktop, like new folders, renamed files, or updated tags, now appear on your device more consistently  
- Edits you make on mobile, such as reordering or basic adjustments, sync back to Artemis Studio for Desktop with fewer delays  
- Sync is more resilient on slower or unstable connections, so you are less likely to end up with missing or duplicated images  

More control over your library  
- Updated handling of large galleries improves performance when you are working with thousands of images  
- Better detection and handling of partial syncs helps keep your mobile and desktop libraries aligned  

This release focuses on stability and reliability, so your gallery feels more fluid and you can trust that what you see on your device matches what you see in Artemis Studio for Desktop.
cn.description:
Artemis offers a comprehensive database of professional motion picture cameras and lenses, with the facility to add any custom camera format. 

Hear from our users:

Roger Deakins ASC, BSC: Cinematographer (Two Academy Awards wins, 16 nominations)
Blade Runner 2049, Sicario, James Bond: Skyfall, The Shawshank Redemption
- “It’s great having Artemis on my iPhone. Since I always have my phone with me, I always have a viewfinder at hand. Not only convenient but extremely accurate.”


Claudio Miranda ASC: Cinematographer
Top Gun: Maverick, F1, Life of Pi, Benjamin Button, Oblivion
- “I've been using Artemis from the very beginning. I love that it's a shared tool. First between the director and myself. Then once we approve shots, the images from Artemis get shared with the crew.”


Kate Dennis DGA: Director
The Handmaid’s Tale, Glow, The Serpent Queen
- "Artemis has streamlined my communication with cinematographers, VFX supervisors and other Heads of Department. Now we all know that we are talking about the exact same frame!"


Linus Sandgren FSF: Cinematographer
Saltburn, La La Land, Babylon, Joy, American Hustle
- "Artemis is an amazing Swiss army knife style lens kit that has helped me frame up countless shots in any format in an instant.”


Matthew Libatique ASC: Cinematographer
Maestro, A Star is Born, Black Swan, Requiem for a Dream, The Fountain
- "Not only do I frame every shot with Artemis , I use it to record blocking  rehearsals and as part of my process when debating lens and format choices as I work with a director and production designer while location scouting.”


Nicolas Winding Refn: Director
Too Old to Die Young, The Neon Demon, Only God Forgives, Pusher
- "Artemis Pro has tapped into the way of the future by taking full advantage of the digital revolution.  The app quickly became an essential tool to capturing my vision.”


Mandy Walker ASC, ACS: Cinematographer
Elvis, Mulan,, Hidden Figures, Truth, Australia
- "Both Artemis & Artemis Prime are essential tool when scouting locations, allowing accurate information to pass from the director and DP to the crew"


Barry Ackroyd BSC: Cinematographer
Jason Bourne, The Big Short, Captain Phillips, Hurt Locker
- "Artemis makes me feel smarter than I was without it. It’s the sharpest tool on my iPhone.”


Toby Oliver ACS Cinematographer
Get Out, M3GAN 2.0, Happy Death Day, Insidious IV, Wolf Creek 2
- "Artemis Pro is so well thought out. You can precisely choose the camera package and lenses you have to hand to obtain exact ideas of shot angles and sizes on the location survey.”


Darius Khondji ASC, AFC, ACS: Cinematographer
Bardo, Okja, The Lost City of Z, Delicatessen, Se7en
- "Artemis is the best cinematic tool of modern times. I started using Artemis in 2010 and have loved it ever since. It is so accurate with up to date lenses, cameras and formats. It is always with us on scouts and during shoots. Artemis allows the director and I to share how we see things with each other and with the rest of the crew.”


Robert McLachlan ASC, CSC: Director / Cinematographer
Landman, Yellowstone, Game of Thrones, Westworld
- “On Game of Thrones we scouted locations months in advance. Artemis allowed me to communicate our needs to the VFX and art departments. It was critical in planning the Dance of Dragons sequence.”


Craig Zobel: Director
Westworld, American Gods, The Leftovers, The Penguin
- “I use Artemis on a daily basis. Both on set where it saves so much time, but also to help plan for a shoot, as accurate photo storyboards have become so useful. I can't imagine filming without it these days. I always have my phone, so I always have a viewfinder.”


Artemis also offers:
- Virtual Stand-Ins, to assist in blocking actors
- Custom Frame-lines
- Share camera & lens setups with other Artemis users
- Record Images & Videos
- Gallery for sorting and planning
- Export of Shot-lists & Storyboards
- Export of detailed Shot-Plans with sun position data (if paired with the Helios app)

cn.description:
阿福出境管家帮助你理清「这次出境前要准备什么」：是否需要签证、如何准备材料、风险与薄弱环节在哪里，以及保险、入境与行前事项等参考信息。

【能力与场景】
• 覆盖 9 个热门出境目的地（含美国、英国、加拿大、申根、澳大利亚、日本、韩国、新西兰、新加坡等，具体以应用内列表为准）
• AI 签证风险评估：多步问卷，输出通过/拒签风险相关维度的参考分析（非官方结论）
• 工具与攻略：材料清单、申请时间线、多国对比、签证百科类内容；部分目的地含深度报告/付费增值能力（以应用内为准）
• 出境准备向模块：围绕 签证、保险、入境、行前清单、落地出行 等方向组织（与关于页一致）

【说明】
本应用非使领馆或政府机构官方应用，评估与建议仅供准备参考；签证是否签发以使领馆最终决定为准。
使用条款：https://usvisatest.com/terms

今天就开始您的旅程！
下载BreatheIn，踏入和平、平衡和活力的世界。您每次的呼吸都是通往更充实的您的一步！

hk.description:
Notteka係一款專為高效會議而生嘅AI會議記錄應用，幫你輕鬆錄音、精準轉寫、智能總結，令會議記錄唔再係負擔。

  核心功能：

  【實時錄音轉寫】                                                                                                    
  一鍵錄音，AI實時將語音轉為文字。支援廣東話、普通話、英文、日文四種語言，滿足多語言會議場景。
                                                                                                                      
  【AI智能摘要】                                                    
  會議結束後，AI自動生成結構化會議摘要。多種摘要模版可揀，快速提煉會議重點、待辦事項同決議內容。                      
                                                                                                                      
  【音視頻文件導入】                           
  支援從本地或其它APP導入音頻、視頻文件，自動完成轉寫，令已有嘅錄音都可以快速變成文字記錄。                           
                                                                                                                      
  【AI對話助手】                               
  針對會議內容進行AI對話，快速獲取關鍵信息，追問細節，令會議內容隨時可查可問。                                        
                                                                                                                      
  【便捷管理】                                 
  - 會議記錄按時間自動分組，一目了然                                                                                  
  - 支援搜索、編輯、分享、複製                                      
  - 文件夾分類管理，井井有條                   
                                                                                                                      
  【多語言界面】
  應用界面支援簡體中文、粵語、英文、日文，適配唔同地區用戶。                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  無論係工作會議、課堂講座、訪談記錄定係靈感備忘，Notteka都係你嘅智能會議拍檔。

hk.description:
歡迎遊玩Balatro官方遊戲！

Balatro是一款混合接龍與撲克等紙牌遊戲的神奇混合體，讓您以前所未見的方式扭曲遊戲規則，令人愛不釋手、滿意無比！
你的目標：打造強力的撲克手牌，擊敗Boss盲注。 
找尋改變遊戲的新小丑，創造精彩絕倫的組合！贏得足量籌碼，擊敗詭譎頭目，在遊戲中尋覓隱藏獎勵出牌和牌組。 
要擊敗大頭目，贏得最終挑戰並贏得遊戲，您需要聚集可以獲得的一切輔助手段。

遊戲特性：

每次遊玩都不一樣：每次抓牌、棄牌和小丑都能極大程度地變化您本次遊玩的進程。
多種遊戲物品：發現超過150種小丑，每種小丑都有特別的能力。將它們與不同牌組相結合，升級牌和禮券提升得分。
多樣遊戲模式：戰役模式與挑戰模式，供您隨心遊玩。
美麗的畫素美術：在CRT風的模糊畫面中沉溺，享受手工繪製、細緻入微的畫素美術：

hk.description:
一场灭门惨案，将你的人生彻底改写。作为幸存者，是隐姓埋名选择另一种人生，还是卧薪尝胆查出真相？商贾小姐、异邦花魁、神秘刺客甚至名门贵女，这些女子又与当年的案件有什么关系？迷雾重重之中，唯一清楚的是，通向未来的选择权在你的手中。
恋爱互动影游《完蛋！我被美女包围了！》系列正统新作，转换时空，抛却现代的桎梏，携六位佳人，共度一场跌宕起伏的古典浪漫冒险之旅。

mo.trackName: 拒之-骚扰电话批量拦截助手
mo.releaseNotes:
【更新内容】
1. 免费！免费！拒之即日起永久免费！
2. 重磅推出「私语 - 量子加密输入法」，在任何软件上加密聊天，保护您的隐私信息，从根源杜绝电话骚扰
3. 适配iOS26界面，支持液态玻璃UI
4. 更新狐智AI模型，新学习了近期的号码样本，去除了历史废弃号码库，新增普通模式号码8W+，新增国家反诈数据库3W+
5. 更新香港官方骚扰号码库号码，新增号码4W+
6. 修复白名单部分授权通讯录时显示异常的问题
7. 完全重构代码，大幅优化安装包大小至8M


《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
mo.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

Swipe screen to change focal lengths. 
Double tap the screen for Full Screen mode.
The same, but better.

Smoother gallery browsing  
- Images now load more quickly as you scroll, so you can move through large collections without waiting  
- Thumbnails are sharper and more consistent, making it easier to spot the images you need at a glance  
- Improved layout and spacing help you scan rows of images without losing your place  

Stronger sync with Artemis Studio for Desktop  
- Changes you make on desktop, like new folders, renamed files, or updated tags, now appear on your device more consistently  
- Edits you make on mobile, such as reordering or basic adjustments, sync back to Artemis Studio for Desktop with fewer delays  
- Sync is more resilient on slower or unstable connections, so you are less likely to end up with missing or duplicated images  

More control over your library  
- Updated handling of large galleries improves performance when you are working with thousands of images  
- Better detection and handling of partial syncs helps keep your mobile and desktop libraries aligned  

This release focuses on stability and reliability, so your gallery feels more fluid and you can trust that what you see on your device matches what you see in Artemis Studio for Desktop.
mo.description:
Artemis offers a comprehensive database of professional motion picture cameras and lenses, with the facility to add any custom camera format. 

Hear from our users:

Roger Deakins ASC, BSC: Cinematographer (Two Academy Awards wins, 16 nominations)
Blade Runner 2049, Sicario, James Bond: Skyfall, The Shawshank Redemption
- “It’s great having Artemis on my iPhone. Since I always have my phone with me, I always have a viewfinder at hand. Not only convenient but extremely accurate.”


Claudio Miranda ASC: Cinematographer
Top Gun: Maverick, F1, Life of Pi, Benjamin Button, Oblivion
- “I've been using Artemis from the very beginning. I love that it's a shared tool. First between the director and myself. Then once we approve shots, the images from Artemis get shared with the crew.”


Kate Dennis DGA: Director
The Handmaid’s Tale, Glow, The Serpent Queen
- "Artemis has streamlined my communication with cinematographers, VFX supervisors and other Heads of Department. Now we all know that we are talking about the exact same frame!"


Linus Sandgren FSF: Cinematographer
Saltburn, La La Land, Babylon, Joy, American Hustle
- "Artemis is an amazing Swiss army knife style lens kit that has helped me frame up countless shots in any format in an instant.”


Matthew Libatique ASC: Cinematographer
Maestro, A Star is Born, Black Swan, Requiem for a Dream, The Fountain
- "Not only do I frame every shot with Artemis , I use it to record blocking  rehearsals and as part of my process when debating lens and format choices as I work with a director and production designer while location scouting.”


Nicolas Winding Refn: Director
Too Old to Die Young, The Neon Demon, Only God Forgives, Pusher
- "Artemis Pro has tapped into the way of the future by taking full advantage of the digital revolution.  The app quickly became an essential tool to capturing my vision.”


Mandy Walker ASC, ACS: Cinematographer
Elvis, Mulan,, Hidden Figures, Truth, Australia
- "Both Artemis & Artemis Prime are essential tool when scouting locations, allowing accurate information to pass from the director and DP to the crew"


Barry Ackroyd BSC: Cinematographer
Jason Bourne, The Big Short, Captain Phillips, Hurt Locker
- "Artemis makes me feel smarter than I was without it. It’s the sharpest tool on my iPhone.”


Toby Oliver ACS Cinematographer
Get Out, M3GAN 2.0, Happy Death Day, Insidious IV, Wolf Creek 2
- "Artemis Pro is so well thought out. You can precisely choose the camera package and lenses you have to hand to obtain exact ideas of shot angles and sizes on the location survey.”


Darius Khondji ASC, AFC, ACS: Cinematographer
Bardo, Okja, The Lost City of Z, Delicatessen, Se7en
- "Artemis is the best cinematic tool of modern times. I started using Artemis in 2010 and have loved it ever since. It is so accurate with up to date lenses, cameras and formats. It is always with us on scouts and during shoots. Artemis allows the director and I to share how we see things with each other and with the rest of the crew.”


Robert McLachlan ASC, CSC: Director / Cinematographer
Landman, Yellowstone, Game of Thrones, Westworld
- “On Game of Thrones we scouted locations months in advance. Artemis allowed me to communicate our needs to the VFX and art departments. It was critical in planning the Dance of Dragons sequence.”


Craig Zobel: Director
Westworld, American Gods, The Leftovers, The Penguin
- “I use Artemis on a daily basis. Both on set where it saves so much time, but also to help plan for a shoot, as accurate photo storyboards have become so useful. I can't imagine filming without it these days. I always have my phone, so I always have a viewfinder.”


Artemis also offers:
- Virtual Stand-Ins, to assist in blocking actors
- Custom Frame-lines
- Share camera & lens setups with other Artemis users
- Record Images & Videos
- Gallery for sorting and planning
- Export of Shot-lists & Storyboards
- Export of detailed Shot-Plans with sun position data (if paired with the Helios app)

What were your childhood games like?

Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references.

From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored.

“Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology.

Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices.

Compatible with MFI controllers.

Play MONOPOLY on the go without distractions – no ads, no fuss! 

Challenge friends, family and fans from around the globe in the digital version of the official MONOPOLY board game, licensed by Hasbro. 

Head online to play your favourite board game with anyone, anywhere, at any time, or compete against state-of-the-art AI opponents offline. Plus, with the seamless PASS & PLAY mode, you can play the classic MONOPOLY board game with your friends with just one device! 

The classic MONOPOLY board game takes a bold leap into a new format, arriving on mobile with amazing graphics, smooth animations and a catchy soundtrack! 


HOW TO PLAY MONOPOLY

1. Download the official MONOPOLY app
2. Press “PLAY”
3. Pick a mode, board, dice and token
4. Roll the dice and move around the board
5. If you land on a property tile, you can buy it
6. Collect rent when other players land on it
7. Continue around the board, drawing cards when instructed – will you be hit with a surprise tax? Sent to jail? Or get a little bonus money? 
8. If you run out of money, you’ll be bankrupt and out of the game
9. The last player left with a profit wins! 

FEATURES

- MONOPOLY ON THE GO – No connection? No problem. Our roster of AI opponents are ready to challenge you! Or play with your friends offline with Pass & Play! 
- MULTIPLE MODES – Take on AI opponents in Single Player or compete against friends and family in Pass & Play or Online With Friends. Try out Online Multiplayer and face off against fellow tycoons from around the world! 
- EXCLUSIVE BOARDS – Experience the iconic board game like never before with exclusive boards and more! 
- AWESOME NEW TOKENS AND DICE – Whatever your style, MONOPOLY has a set of dice fit for a future tycoon! Pick from nostalgic classic tokens or brand-new designs exclusive to the mobile game.

Get the most authentic MONOPOLY experience with the official MONOPOLY mobile game!

3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

tw.releaseNotes:
Swipe screen to change focal lengths. 
Double tap the screen for Full Screen mode.
The same, but better.

Smoother gallery browsing  
- Images now load more quickly as you scroll, so you can move through large collections without waiting  
- Thumbnails are sharper and more consistent, making it easier to spot the images you need at a glance  
- Improved layout and spacing help you scan rows of images without losing your place  

Stronger sync with Artemis Studio for Desktop  
- Changes you make on desktop, like new folders, renamed files, or updated tags, now appear on your device more consistently  
- Edits you make on mobile, such as reordering or basic adjustments, sync back to Artemis Studio for Desktop with fewer delays  
- Sync is more resilient on slower or unstable connections, so you are less likely to end up with missing or duplicated images

- Better detection and handling of partial syncs helps keep your mobile and desktop libraries aligned  

This release focuses on stability and reliability, so your gallery feels more fluid and you can trust that what you see on your device matches what you see in Artemis Studio for Desktop.
tw.description:
Artemis offers a comprehensive database of professional motion picture cameras and lenses, with the facility to add any custom camera format. 

Hear from our users:

Roger Deakins ASC, BSC: Cinematographer (Two Academy Awards wins, 16 nominations)
Blade Runner 2049, Sicario, James Bond: Skyfall, The Shawshank Redemption
- “It’s great having Artemis on my iPhone. Since I always have my phone with me, I always have a viewfinder at hand. Not only convenient but extremely accurate.”


Claudio Miranda ASC: Cinematographer
Top Gun: Maverick, F1, Life of Pi, Benjamin Button, Oblivion
- “I've been using Artemis from the very beginning. I love that it's a shared tool. First between the director and myself. Then once we approve shots, the images from Artemis get shared with the crew.”


Kate Dennis DGA: Director
The Handmaid’s Tale, Glow, The Serpent Queen
- "Artemis has streamlined my communication with cinematographers, VFX supervisors and other Heads of Department. Now we all know that we are talking about the exact same frame!"


Linus Sandgren FSF: Cinematographer
Saltburn, La La Land, Babylon, Joy, American Hustle
- "Artemis is an amazing Swiss army knife style lens kit that has helped me frame up countless shots in any format in an instant.”


Matthew Libatique ASC: Cinematographer
Maestro, A Star is Born, Black Swan, Requiem for a Dream, The Fountain
- "Not only do I frame every shot with Artemis , I use it to record blocking  rehearsals and as part of my process when debating lens and format choices as I work with a director and production designer while location scouting.”


Nicolas Winding Refn: Director
Too Old to Die Young, The Neon Demon, Only God Forgives, Pusher
- "Artemis Pro has tapped into the way of the future by taking full advantage of the digital revolution.  The app quickly became an essential tool to capturing my vision.”


Mandy Walker ASC, ACS: Cinematographer
Elvis, Mulan,, Hidden Figures, Truth, Australia
- "Both Artemis & Artemis Prime are essential tool when scouting locations, allowing accurate information to pass from the director and DP to the crew"


Barry Ackroyd BSC: Cinematographer
Jason Bourne, The Big Short, Captain Phillips, Hurt Locker
- "Artemis makes me feel smarter than I was without it. It’s the sharpest tool on my iPhone.”


Toby Oliver ACS Cinematographer
Get Out, M3GAN 2.0, Happy Death Day, Insidious IV, Wolf Creek 2
- "Artemis Pro is so well thought out. You can precisely choose the camera package and lenses you have to hand to obtain exact ideas of shot angles and sizes on the location survey.”


Darius Khondji ASC, AFC, ACS: Cinematographer
Bardo, Okja, The Lost City of Z, Delicatessen, Se7en
- "Artemis is the best cinematic tool of modern times. I started using Artemis in 2010 and have loved it ever since. It is so accurate with up to date lenses, cameras and formats. It is always with us on scouts and during shoots. Artemis allows the director and I to share how we see things with each other and with the rest of the crew.”


Robert McLachlan ASC, CSC: Director / Cinematographer
Landman, Yellowstone, Game of Thrones, Westworld
- “On Game of Thrones we scouted locations months in advance. Artemis allowed me to communicate our needs to the VFX and art departments. It was critical in planning the Dance of Dragons sequence.”


Craig Zobel: Director
Westworld, American Gods, The Leftovers, The Penguin
- “I use Artemis on a daily basis. Both on set where it saves so much time, but also to help plan for a shoot, as accurate photo storyboards have become so useful. I can't imagine filming without it these days. I always have my phone, so I always have a viewfinder.”


Artemis also offers:
- Virtual Stand-Ins, to assist in blocking actors
- Custom Frame-lines
- Share camera & lens setups with other Artemis users
- Record Images & Videos
- Gallery for sorting and planning
- Export of Shot-lists & Storyboards
- Export of detailed Shot-Plans with sun position data (if paired with the Helios app)

What were your childhood games like?

Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references.

From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored.

“Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology.

Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices.  

« It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat

“Evoland 2 manages to seamlessly blend an incredible number of genres into a single, wonderful experience.”
4/5 – Hardcoregamer

Compatible with MFI controllers. 

If you experience any problem with Evoland 2, please contact our customer support at hello@playdigious.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

tw.description:
阿福出境管家帮助你理清「这次出境前要准备什么」：是否需要签证、如何准备材料、风险与薄弱环节在哪里，以及保险、入境与行前事项等参考信息。

【能力与场景】
• 覆盖 9 个热门出境目的地（含美国、英国、加拿大、申根、澳大利亚、日本、韩国、新西兰、新加坡等，具体以应用内列表为准）
• AI 签证风险评估：多步问卷，输出通过/拒签风险相关维度的参考分析（非官方结论）
• 工具与攻略：材料清单、申请时间线、多国对比、签证百科类内容；部分目的地含深度报告/付费增值能力（以应用内为准）
• 出境准备向模块：围绕 签证、保险、入境、行前清单、落地出行 等方向组织（与关于页一致）

【说明】
本应用非使领馆或政府机构官方应用，评估与建议仅供准备参考；签证是否签发以使领馆最终决定为准。
使用条款：https://usvisatest.com/terms

Feeling overwhelmed by the chaos of life? Find your peace and vitality with BreatheIn, the app that helps you unlock the power of mindful breathing.

Rediscover Calm and Energy

Deep, mindful breathing is the key to a calm mind and a vibrant body. With BreatheIn, immerse yourself in guided exercises that harmonize your body and mind, leading to true balance and renewal.

Expertly Curated Practices

We've handpicked and tested each exercise to ensure you get the best. Start your journey toward a healthier, more fulfilled life today!

Seamless Apple Health Integration

Track your progress effortlessly—BreatheIn automatically syncs with Apple Health, making it easy to monitor your wellness journey.

Explore a Range of Techniques

- Square Breathing (4-4-4-4): Regain control and calm your mind.
- Relax Breathing (4-7-8): Beat anxiety and fall asleep faster.
- Bee Breathing: Soothe your mind with this relaxing technique.
- Coherent Breathing: Improve your well-being through HRV enhancement.
- Transform Your Life, One Breath at a Time

Conquer stress, boost your resilience, and rediscover balance with every breath. Download BreatheIn now and take the first step toward a more vibrant, peaceful you!

遊戲特性：

每次遊玩都不一樣：每次抓牌、棄牌和小丑都能極大程度地變化您本次遊玩的進程。
多種遊戲物品：發現超過150種小丑，每種小丑都有特別的能力。將它們與不同牌組相結合，升級牌和禮券提升得分。
多樣遊戲模式：戰役模式與挑戰模式，供您隨心遊玩。

us.description:
Welcome to the official Balatro mobile game!

Hypnotic and endlessly satisfying, Balatro is a magical mix of card games like Solitaire and Poker, that lets you twist the rules in ways never seen before!

Your goal is to beat the Boss Blinds by making strong poker hands.

Find new Jokers that change the game and create awesome and exciting combos! Win enough chips to beat tricky bosses, and find hidden bonus hands and decks as you play. You’ll need all the help you can get to beat the big boss, win the final challenge, and win the game.

Features:

* Remastered controls for touch screen devices.
* Each run is different: every pick-up, discard and joker can dramatically alter the course of your run.
* Multiple game items: discover over 150 Jokers, each with special powers. Use them with different decks,upgrade cards and vouchers to boost your scores.
* Different Game modes: Campaign mode and challenge mode for you to play.
* Beautiful Pixel Art: Immerse yourself in the CRT fuzz and enjoy detailed, hand-crafted pixel art.

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

tr.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

tr.description:
Artemis offers a comprehensive database of professional motion picture cameras and lenses, with the facility to add any custom camera format. 

Hear from our users:

Roger Deakins ASC, BSC: Cinematographer (Two Academy Awards wins, 16 nominations)
Blade Runner 2049, Sicario, James Bond: Skyfall, The Shawshank Redemption
- “It’s great having Artemis on my iPhone. Since I always have my phone with me, I always have a viewfinder at hand. Not only convenient but extremely accurate.”


Claudio Miranda ASC: Cinematographer
Top Gun: Maverick, F1, Life of Pi, Benjamin Button, Oblivion
- “I've been using Artemis from the very beginning. I love that it's a shared tool. First between the director and myself. Then once we approve shots, the images from Artemis get shared with the crew.”


Kate Dennis DGA: Director
The Handmaid’s Tale, Glow, The Serpent Queen
- "Artemis has streamlined my communication with cinematographers, VFX supervisors and other Heads of Department. Now we all know that we are talking about the exact same frame!"


Linus Sandgren FSF: Cinematographer
Saltburn, La La Land, Babylon, Joy, American Hustle
- "Artemis is an amazing Swiss army knife style lens kit that has helped me frame up countless shots in any format in an instant.”


Matthew Libatique ASC: Cinematographer
Maestro, A Star is Born, Black Swan, Requiem for a Dream, The Fountain
- "Not only do I frame every shot with Artemis , I use it to record blocking  rehearsals and as part of my process when debating lens and format choices as I work with a director and production designer while location scouting.”


Nicolas Winding Refn: Director
Too Old to Die Young, The Neon Demon, Only God Forgives, Pusher
- "Artemis Pro has tapped into the way of the future by taking full advantage of the digital revolution.  The app quickly became an essential tool to capturing my vision.”


Mandy Walker ASC, ACS: Cinematographer
Elvis, Mulan,, Hidden Figures, Truth, Australia
- "Both Artemis & Artemis Prime are essential tool when scouting locations, allowing accurate information to pass from the director and DP to the crew"


Barry Ackroyd BSC: Cinematographer
Jason Bourne, The Big Short, Captain Phillips, Hurt Locker
- "Artemis makes me feel smarter than I was without it. It’s the sharpest tool on my iPhone.”


Toby Oliver ACS Cinematographer
Get Out, M3GAN 2.0, Happy Death Day, Insidious IV, Wolf Creek 2
- "Artemis Pro is so well thought out. You can precisely choose the camera package and lenses you have to hand to obtain exact ideas of shot angles and sizes on the location survey.”


Darius Khondji ASC, AFC, ACS: Cinematographer
Bardo, Okja, The Lost City of Z, Delicatessen, Se7en
- "Artemis is the best cinematic tool of modern times. I started using Artemis in 2010 and have loved it ever since. It is so accurate with up to date lenses, cameras and formats. It is always with us on scouts and during shoots. Artemis allows the director and I to share how we see things with each other and with the rest of the crew.”


Robert McLachlan ASC, CSC: Director / Cinematographer
Landman, Yellowstone, Game of Thrones, Westworld
- “On Game of Thrones we scouted locations months in advance. Artemis allowed me to communicate our needs to the VFX and art departments. It was critical in planning the Dance of Dragons sequence.”


Craig Zobel: Director
Westworld, American Gods, The Leftovers, The Penguin
- “I use Artemis on a daily basis. Both on set where it saves so much time, but also to help plan for a shoot, as accurate photo storyboards have become so useful. I can't imagine filming without it these days. I always have my phone, so I always have a viewfinder.”


Artemis also offers:
- Virtual Stand-Ins, to assist in blocking actors
- Custom Frame-lines
- Share camera & lens setups with other Artemis users
- Record Images & Videos
- Gallery for sorting and planning
- Export of Shot-lists & Storyboards
- Export of detailed Shot-Plans with sun position data (if paired with the Helios app)

tr.description:
RadarScope is an AMS-award-winning weather visualization tool that empowers meteorologists, public safety officials, storm spotters, and weather enthusiasts to view a full suite of single-site radar data and related severe weather products. Your initial purchase provides professional radar visualization in a fully native app, free from distracting and invasive practices, with optional subscription packages to add even more capabilities.

Whether you’re scanning for a mesocyclone’s tell-tale hook echo, pinpointing the landfall of a hurricane’s eye wall, or identifying velocity couplet, hail spike, or debris ball signatures, RadarScope displays native radar data in its original radial format. You see what the radar sees almost as soon as the radar sees it, with automatic updates every two to ten minutes depending on the radar’s scanning strategy.

Your initial app purchase includes the following:

• Full suite of single-site radar products for the US, Canada, Guam, Denmark, Finland, and Germany
• 6-frame radar loops
• Two built-in providers for radar data
• Tornado, thunderstorm, flash flood, marine, snow squall, extreme wind, tropical, and other warnings in the US
• Selected severe weather warnings in Canada and Australia
• NWS-generated storm tracks with hail, TVS, and mesocyclone attributes
• Inspector and distance tools
• Color palette options for radar data
• AllisonHouse data plan integration
• Spotter Network integration for storm and location reporting
• mPING integration for submitting weather reports to NSSL
• Bundled maps with political boundaries, water bodies, and major highways, optimized for low-bandwidth use
• Support for widgets and complications
• Universal app for Apple platforms, including Apple Watch and Apple TV
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier One is an optional annual subscription that adds more features for tracking severe weather:

• 30-frame radar loops
• Cloud-to-ground lightning strikes
• Severe weather watches in the US and Canada
• Special weather statements in the US and Canada
• Mesoscale convective and precipitation discussions
• SPC convective, tornado, hail, wind, and fire outlooks
• WPC excessive rainfall outlooks in the US
• Local storm reports in the US
• Custom color palette support
• Multi-pane display (2 on phones; 4 on larger devices)
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier Two is an optional annual or monthly subscription that transforms RadarScope into a more complete visualization tool for a larger suite of weather products, including:

• Everything in Pro Tier One
• 50-frame radar loops
• A third provider for US radar data
• NEXRAD Level II radar data for the US with a 30-year historical archive
• Historical NEXRAD Level III, super-res, and non-US radar data with a 30-day archive
• Historical NWS bulletins with a 19-year archive
• GOES East and GOES West satellite products
• NSSL’s Multi-Radar Multi-Sensor (MRMS) products
• NCEP’s Real-Time Mesoscale Assimilation (RTMA) products
• Surface observations
• Atmospheric soundings in the US
• Hail size, hail probability, and azimuthal shear contours with a 30-day archive
• More detailed transportation and satellite imagery maps
• Custom color palette support for GOES, MRMS, and RTMA
• Server-sent events for radar and warning updates
• Cross-platform subscription sharing on up to 5 devices
• Family sharing support

If you choose to buy a RadarScope Pro subscription, it will be charged to your App Store account. The subscription will be auto-renewed within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the same price you originally paid. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal disabled via your App Store account settings after the purchase. Once purchased, the subscription cannot be canceled during the active subscription period.

DTN is committed to safeguarding your privacy online. Our privacy policy is available for review at https://www.dtn.com/privacy-policy/

Please visit our web site for more information.

pt.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee



Terms & Conditions: https://kaylees.site/terms-and-conditions.html
EULA: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

pt.description:
Artemis offers a comprehensive database of professional motion picture cameras and lenses, with the facility to add any custom camera format. 

Hear from our users:

Roger Deakins ASC, BSC: Cinematographer (Two Academy Awards wins, 16 nominations)
Blade Runner 2049, Sicario, James Bond: Skyfall, The Shawshank Redemption
- “It’s great having Artemis on my iPhone. Since I always have my phone with me, I always have a viewfinder at hand. Not only convenient but extremely accurate.”


Claudio Miranda ASC: Cinematographer
Top Gun: Maverick, F1, Life of Pi, Benjamin Button, Oblivion
- “I've been using Artemis from the very beginning. I love that it's a shared tool. First between the director and myself. Then once we approve shots, the images from Artemis get shared with the crew.”


Kate Dennis DGA: Director
The Handmaid’s Tale, Glow, The Serpent Queen
- "Artemis has streamlined my communication with cinematographers, VFX supervisors and other Heads of Department. Now we all know that we are talking about the exact same frame!"


Linus Sandgren FSF: Cinematographer
Saltburn, La La Land, Babylon, Joy, American Hustle
- "Artemis is an amazing Swiss army knife style lens kit that has helped me frame up countless shots in any format in an instant.”


Matthew Libatique ASC: Cinematographer
Maestro, A Star is Born, Black Swan, Requiem for a Dream, The Fountain
- "Not only do I frame every shot with Artemis , I use it to record blocking  rehearsals and as part of my process when debating lens and format choices as I work with a director and production designer while location scouting.”


Nicolas Winding Refn: Director
Too Old to Die Young, The Neon Demon, Only God Forgives, Pusher
- "Artemis Pro has tapped into the way of the future by taking full advantage of the digital revolution.  The app quickly became an essential tool to capturing my vision.”


Mandy Walker ASC, ACS: Cinematographer
Elvis, Mulan,, Hidden Figures, Truth, Australia
- "Both Artemis & Artemis Prime are essential tool when scouting locations, allowing accurate information to pass from the director and DP to the crew"


Barry Ackroyd BSC: Cinematographer
Jason Bourne, The Big Short, Captain Phillips, Hurt Locker
- "Artemis makes me feel smarter than I was without it. It’s the sharpest tool on my iPhone.”


Toby Oliver ACS Cinematographer
Get Out, M3GAN 2.0, Happy Death Day, Insidious IV, Wolf Creek 2
- "Artemis Pro is so well thought out. You can precisely choose the camera package and lenses you have to hand to obtain exact ideas of shot angles and sizes on the location survey.”


Darius Khondji ASC, AFC, ACS: Cinematographer
Bardo, Okja, The Lost City of Z, Delicatessen, Se7en
- "Artemis is the best cinematic tool of modern times. I started using Artemis in 2010 and have loved it ever since. It is so accurate with up to date lenses, cameras and formats. It is always with us on scouts and during shoots. Artemis allows the director and I to share how we see things with each other and with the rest of the crew.”


Robert McLachlan ASC, CSC: Director / Cinematographer
Landman, Yellowstone, Game of Thrones, Westworld
- “On Game of Thrones we scouted locations months in advance. Artemis allowed me to communicate our needs to the VFX and art departments. It was critical in planning the Dance of Dragons sequence.”


Craig Zobel: Director
Westworld, American Gods, The Leftovers, The Penguin
- “I use Artemis on a daily basis. Both on set where it saves so much time, but also to help plan for a shoot, as accurate photo storyboards have become so useful. I can't imagine filming without it these days. I always have my phone, so I always have a viewfinder.”


Artemis also offers:
- Virtual Stand-Ins, to assist in blocking actors
- Custom Frame-lines
- Share camera & lens setups with other Artemis users
- Record Images & Videos
- Gallery for sorting and planning
- Export of Shot-lists & Storyboards
- Export of detailed Shot-Plans with sun position data (if paired with the Helios app)

pt.description:
阿福出境管家帮助你理清「这次出境前要准备什么」：是否需要签证、如何准备材料、风险与薄弱环节在哪里，以及保险、入境与行前事项等参考信息。

【能力与场景】
• 覆盖 9 个热门出境目的地（含美国、英国、加拿大、申根、澳大利亚、日本、韩国、新西兰、新加坡等，具体以应用内列表为准）
• AI 签证风险评估：多步问卷，输出通过/拒签风险相关维度的参考分析（非官方结论）
• 工具与攻略：材料清单、申请时间线、多国对比、签证百科类内容；部分目的地含深度报告/付费增值能力（以应用内为准）
• 出境准备向模块：围绕 签证、保险、入境、行前清单、落地出行 等方向组织（与关于页一致）

【说明】
本应用非使领馆或政府机构官方应用，评估与建议仅供准备参考；签证是否签发以使领馆最终决定为准。

pt.description:
Damos-te a boas-vindas ao jogo oficial do Balatro!

Altamente viciante e satisfatório, Balatro consiste numa combinação mágica de jogos de cartas como Solitário e Póquer e dá-te a possibilidade de quebrares as regras de uma forma nunca antes vista!
O teu objetivo é ultrapassares as Boss Blinds conseguindo mãos fortes de póquer. 
Encontra novos Jokers que mudam o jogo e criam incríveis e entusiasmantes combinações! Ganha fichas suficientes para ultrapassares os astutos bosses e encontra baralhos e mãos de bónus ocultos enquanto jogas. 
Serve-te de todo o tipo de ajudas para derrotares o boss principal, ultrapassares o desafio final e venceres o jogo.

Características:

Cada sessão é diferente: cada item recolhido, cada carta descartada e cada joker podem mudar drasticamente o rumo do jogo.
Vários itens de jogo: descobre mais de 150 Jokers, cada um com poderes especiais. Usa-os com baralhos diferentes, mehora cartas e vouchers para conseguires pontuações melhores.
Diferentes modos de jogo: Desfruta do modo de campanha e do modo de desafio.
Espetacular arte pixelizada: Regressa à era dos CRTs e desfruta de uma arte pixelizada rica em detalhes e criada de forma manual.

pt.description:
Aproveite a primeira entrada da série móvel Way of the Hunter, ambientada no belo noroeste do Pacífico norte-americano.

Esta experiência de caça autêntica deixa você caçar e explorar ambientes abertos enormes nos Nez Perce Valleys dos Estados Unidos. Encontre animais realistas em belos habitats naturais e utilize diversas réplicas detalhadas de armas.

Way of the Hunter oferece uma experiência altamente imersiva e integrada, com vida selvagem deslumbrante e comportamento realista dos grupos de animais. Testemunhe as transformações em ecossistemas complexos, que reagem e se adaptam ao que você fizer. Aprenda a caçar de verdade e ponha suas habilidades à prova.

Enfrente os desafios da caça ética com uma história cativante, ou simplesmente divirta-se caçando em ambientes deslumbrantes.

* Dezenas de espécies incrivelmente detalhadas com comportamentos realistas para proporcionar uma experiência de caça verdadeiramente imersiva.
* Cace como um profissional com recursos que destacam sinais de animais e analisam respingos de sangue. Analise a trajetória dos seus disparos com a câmera rebobinável.
* Use seu sentido de caçador para destacar detalhes e informações importantes, ou desative-o.
* O complexo sistema de troféus gera chifres exclusivos com base em vários fatores, como estado físico e idade das caças.
* Animações e reações de animais naturais e sofisticadas ao sentir a presença dos jogadores.
* Ciclos de dia e noite com 24 horas, além de vento e clima variáveis.
* Simulação realística de balística e de física de projéteis.
* Grande seleção de armas de fogo e equipamentos, incluindo itens licenciados das empresas Bushnell, Federal, Leupold, Primos, Remington e Steyr Arms.
* A economia do jogo permite a você caçar e vender a carne para comprar mais equipamentos, licenças de caça e serviços de taxidermia para seus troféus.
* Uma história cativante sobre os obstáculos enfrentados por uma empresa familiar de caça e a rivalidade e amizades que a cercam.
* Modo de fotografia intuitivo, para capturar e compartilhar seus momentos favoritos.
* Rastreie a sua presa usando ou o gamepad ou os controles de toque
* Controle otimizado e eficiente para dispositivos móveis

AVISO:
Dispositivos com menos de 4 GB de RAM não são suportados!
Necessita de um dispositivo com pelo menos 6 GB de RAM para utilizar as definições gráficas mais elevadas.

Editora: http://www.handy-games.com/contact/

© www.handy-games.com GmbH
